entities.name: OVEREXPLOITATION
entities.description: A short-term threat to food tree species involving excessive use of resources

entities.name: OVERGRAZING
entities.description: A threat to food tree species caused by excessive livestock grazing

entities.name: FIRE
entities.description: A threat to food tree species caused by wildfires

entities.name: COTTON PRODUCTION
entities.description: A short-term threat to food tree species related to agricultural expansion

entities.name: MINING
entities.description: A threat to food tree species caused by mining activities

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A prevalent long-term threat affecting the distribution and survival of food tree species

entities.name: SPECIES DISTRIBUTION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to predict the spatial distribution of species and the impact of threats

entities.name: CLIMATE MODELS
entities.description: Models used to predict future climate conditions and their impact on habitats

entities.name: EXPERT SURVEY RESULTS
entities.description: Data gathered from local experts to guide species selection and threat assessment

entities.name: SPATIALLY EXPLICIT APPROACH
entities.description: A fine-scale approach combining datasets and models to predict threat impacts

entities.name: EX SITU CONSERVATION
entities.description: Conservation strategy involving the collection of seed sources outside their natural habitat

entities.name: ASSISTED REGENERATION
entities.description: Conservation strategy for populations in suitable future habitats facing high short-term threats

entities.name: FOOD TREE SPECIES
entities.description: Indigenous tree species that contribute to income generation and nutrition in rural households

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY PARKLANDS
entities.description: Land-use systems in Burkina Faso combining trees and agriculture under demographic and climatic pressure

entities.name: CONSERVATION PLANNING
entities.description: The process of setting priorities to protect threatened species

entities.name: SPECIES VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a species is susceptible to various threats
